summary: Tested PhantomWorx full stack (FastAPI + React). Backend: 11/11 pytest cases passed covering GET /api/, POST /api/inquiries (valid full, minimal, invalid email, missing fields, length constraints), and GET /api/inquiries (no _id leakage, valid datetime, sorted desc by created_at). Frontend: All sections render with correct data-testids (hero, marquee, ethos, practice with discipline-01..04, listings with lot-001..004, pillars, ventures with venture-1..6, wire, quote, inquire, site-footer). Title is correct ('PhantomWorx — Discreet Brokerage & Private Ventures'). Dark theme + gold accents render. Nav becomes blurred on scroll (nav-blur class). Hero CTAs work — Request Audience smooth-scrolls to inquire; Ethos button scrolls to ethos section. Form: empty submit shows inquire-error 'Name, email, and intent are required.'; valid submission returns sealed success message and clears the form. Footer renders with PhantomWorx branding.

integration_issues.issue: Browser HTML5 validation on type='email' blocks form submission before the client-side handler/axios call runs, so server validation (422) is never reached and the previously-shown 'required' error remains visible. Functionally the user is still prevented from submitting an invalid email, but the displayed message is not the server-side validation message. Minor — not blocking.

action_items: (Optional) To surface server-side email validation explicitly, change inq-email input type from 'email' to 'text' (or add novalidate to the form) so axios call is made and Pydantic's 422 detail can be shown to the user. Current behavior is acceptable for production.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores created_at as ISO string in Mongo and converts back on read — works correctly but consider storing as native BSON datetime for sortability/indexing (Mongo string sort still works for ISO 8601, so this is fine).
POST /api/inquiries returns 200 instead of 201 Created — minor REST convention, not blocking.
Backend has no auth/rate-limit on POST /api/inquiries — fine for MVP but consider basic rate-limiting before public launch.
seed_data_creation: Test created ~5 TEST_ prefixed inquiries in MongoDB 'inquiries' collection via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py can be re-run via `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. All endpoints are live at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api. Frontend uses smooth-scroll anchor navigation; nav-blur class appears when window.scrollY > 24. Inquire form fields: inq-name, inq-email, inq-origin, inq-room, inq-intent; submit via inquire-submit; success at inquire-success ('Sealed.' + 72h message); errors at inquire-error.
rca of the issue: No critical issues. Minor UX note above on inquire form invalid-email path: HTML5 native validation pre-empts server validation; resolved either by using type='text' for email field or adding novalidate to the form element if showing server messages is preferred.
